zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Tudur ap Ednyfed FYCHAN於1178年出生在威爾士安格萊利朗福尼時，他的父親Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules29歲，母親Lady Tangwystl ferch Llywarch29歲。他於1230年與Adelicia or Eva verch Richard在威爾士安格萊結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1278年在英國威爾斯安格萊享年100歲，埋葬在威爾士安格萊利朗福尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Tudur ap Ednyfed FYCHAN于1178年出生在威尔士安格萊利朗福尼时，他的父亲Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules29岁，母亲Lady Tangwystl ferch Llywarch29岁。他于1230年与Adelicia or Eva verch Richard在威尔士安格萊结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1278年在英国威尔斯安格萊享年100岁，埋葬在威尔士安格萊利朗福尼。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: FYCHAN
meanings: Welsh: A Welsh name of great antiquity, from vyckan, little, small; i.e. small in stature. Compare the surname Bychan and the Armoric Le Bihan.

nameMeanings.name: Tudur
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from the Old Celtic form Teutorix, composed of elements meaning ‘people, tribe’ and ‘ruler, king’. It has been described as a Welsh form of Theodore, but there is no connection between them, though it is ultimately akin to the Germanic name Theodoric ( see Terry ).

variants.name: Tudor
meanings: Traditional: from the Old Celtic form Teutorix, composed of elements meaning ‘people, tribe’ and ‘ruler, king’. It has been described as a Welsh form of Theodore, but there is no connection between them, though it is ultimately akin to the Germanic name Theodoric ( see Terry ).

variants.name: Tudyr
meanings: Traditional: from the Old Celtic form Teutorix, composed of elements meaning ‘people, tribe’ and ‘ruler, king’. It has been described as a Welsh form of Theodore, but there is no connection between them, though it is ultimately akin to the Germanic name Theodoric ( see Terry ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Tudur ap Ednyfed FYCHAN was born in 1178, in Llangefni, Anglesey, Wales, his father, Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules, was 29 and his mother, Lady Tangwystl ferch Llywarch, was 29. He married Adelicia or Eva verch Richard in 1230, in Anglesey, Wales. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1278, in Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 100, and was buried in Llangefni, Anglesey, Wales.

fr.Cilcain, Flintshire, Wales, United Kingd: Cilcain, Flintshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Tudur ap Ednyfed FYCHAN est né en 1178, à Llangefni, Anglesey, Galles, son père, Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Lady Tangwystl ferch Llywarch, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Adelicia or Eva verch Richard en 1230, à Anglesey, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1278, à Anglesey, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 100 ans, et a été enterré à Llangefni, Anglesey, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Tudur ap Ednyfed FYCHAN 1178 in Llangefni, Anglesey, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules 29 und seine Mutter Lady Tangwystl ferch Llywarch 29. Er hat 1230 in Anglesey, Wales Adelicia or Eva verch Richard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1278 im Alter von 100 Jahren in Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Llangefni, Anglesey, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Tudur ap Ednyfed FYCHAN è nato il nel 1178 nel Llangefni, Anglesey, Galles, il suo padre, Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Lady Tangwystl ferch Llywarch, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Adelicia or Eva verch Richard nel 1230, nel Anglesey, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1278, nel Anglesey, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 100 anni, e fu sepolto a Llangefni, Anglesey, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Tudur ap Ednyfed FYCHANが1178年にウェールズアングレセイランジェフニで生まれた時，父Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dulesは29歳，母Lady Tangwystl ferch Llywarchは29歳であった。1230年にウェールズアングレセイでAdelicia or Eva verch Richardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1278年にイギリスウェールズアングレセイで100歳で死去し，ウェールズアングレセイランジェフニにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Tudur ap Ednyfed FYCHAN(이)가 1178년 웨일스 앤글레시 랭프니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Tangwystl ferch Llywarch(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1230년 웨일스 앤글레시에서 Adelicia or Eva verch Richard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1278년 영국 웨일스 앤글레시에서 100세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 앤글레시 랭프니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Tudur ap Ednyfed FYCHAN nasceu em 1178, em Llangefni, Anglesey, Gales, seu pai, Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Lady Tangwystl ferch Llywarch, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Adelicia or Eva verch Richard em 1230, em Anglesey, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1278, em Anglesey, Gales, United Kingdom, com 100 anos, e foi sepultado em Llangefni, Anglesey, Gales.

ro.Cilcain, Flintshire, Wales, United Kingd: Cilcain, Flintshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Tudur ap Ednyfed FYCHAN родился в 1178 г. в местности ллангефни, англеси, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Tangwystl ferch Llywarch, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Adelicia or Eva verch Richard в 1230 г. в местности англеси, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1278 г. в местности англеси, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 100 лет и был похоронен в местности ллангефни, англеси, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Tudur ap Ednyfed FYCHAN nació en 1178, en Llangefni, Isla Oscura, Gales, su papá, Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Lady Tangwystl ferch Llywarch, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Adelicia or Eva verch Richard en 1230, en Isla Oscura, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1278, en Isla Oscura, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 100 años, y fue sepultado en Llangefni, Isla Oscura, Gales.
